references.passiveText: There was another expedition before ours. They went {location_hint} and never returned.
references.triggerDialogue: A group led by {target_npc} set out six months ago chasing the same legends we're following. Their last message mentioned finding something extraordinary in a cave system, then silence. If you're heading that way, keep your eyes open for their camp. Whatever they found might still be there, and so might whatever stopped them.

references.passiveText: I know someone who deals in rare materials, no questions asked.
references.triggerDialogue: {target_npc} runs a quiet operation out of {location}. If you bring them unusual finds from your travels: ore samples, old mechanisms, strange crystals: they'll pay handsomely and might point you toward even bigger scores. Just don't mention my name too loudly. Some partnerships work best in the shadows.
